true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
 Activates a Dual attack from the ally with the highest Attack.
If the caster's Defense is currently increased, has an <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease the target's Attack for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
The Skill's damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's Max Health instead of Attack.

If the caster's Defense is currently increased, has an <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease the target's Attack for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間挑発し、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に連携を発生させる。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>がUPした状態の場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間挑発し、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に連携を発生させる。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>がUPした状態の場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。

true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間挑発し、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に連携を発生させる。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>がUPした状態の場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color> 하며, 가장 공격력이 높은 아군의 협공을 발생시킵니다.\n자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 증가한 상태라면 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 공격력 대신 최대 체력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>、使攻击力最高的友军发动夹攻。\n若自身处于<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升状态,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。 \n该技能根据生命值上限而非攻击力等比提升伤害。

SKT_SECOND.name: Sword Destroyer
SKT_SECOND.name_jp: ソード・デストロイア

true_desc_levels.1:
(Passive Effect) At the start of the turn, removes <color=#28d9ed>1 debuff(s)</color> each from the ally with the lowest Health and from the caster.
Then grants a Barrier to the ally with the lowest Health for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>. The Barrier Strength increases proportional to the caster's Max Health.

(Activation Effect) After being hit, uses <color=#28d9ed>Sword Destroyer</color> on the enemy with the highest Speed and has an <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> for 1 turn.
The Skill's damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's Max Health instead of Attack.

(Activation Effect) After being hit, uses <color=#28d9ed>Sword Destroyer</color> on the enemy with the highest Speed and has an <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> for 1 turn.
The Skill's damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's Max Health instead of Attack.

true_desc_levels.1_jp:
(パッシブ効果)
ターン開始後、残りHPが最も低い味方単体と自分の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>をそれぞれ<color=#28d9ed>1</color>個解除する。
その後、残りHPが最も低い味方単体に <color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
自分の最大HPが高いほどシールド量がUPする。

(パッシブ効果) ダメージを受けた後、最もスピードが高い敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>ソード・デストロイア</color>を使用して, <color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。
このスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
(패시브 효과) 턴 시작 시, 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군과 자신에게 걸려 있는 <color=#28d9ed>약화</color> 효과를 각각 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color>  해제합니다.
이후 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군에게 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
실드량은 자신의 최대 체력이 높을수록 증가합니다.

(발동 효과) 피격 후, 가장 속도가 빠른 적에게 <color=#28d9ed>소드 디스트로이어</color>를 사용하며, <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color> 합니다.
이 스킬은 공격력 대신 최대 체력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr:

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
(被动效果)回合开始时,解除生命值状况最差的友军与自身身上的<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。
随后为生命值状况最差的友军赋予<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合。
护盾量随施术者的最大生命值提高而增加。

(触发效果)受到攻击后,对速度最快的敌人使用<color=#28d9ed>剑之毁灭者</color>,有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合的<color=#28d9ed>嘲讽</color>状态。
此技能造成的伤害与最大生命值成正比,而非攻击力。

SKT_ULTIMATE.name: Guardian Sword of the Kingdom
SKT_ULTIMATE.name_jp: キングダムガード・ソード

true_desc_levels.1:
Removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, then attacks all enemies. (Ignores Resilience)
After attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of all allies and the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turn(s).
If the target is a Boss, ignores 30% of their Defense.
This skill's damage increases proportional to Max Health instead of Attack.

true_desc_levels.1_jp:
敵全体の強化効果を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除した後、ダメージを与える。(効果抵抗無視)
攻撃後、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>と自分の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>を <color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
対象がボスの場合、防御力を30%無視する。
このスキルは攻撃力の代わりに最大HPが高いほどダメージがUPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
적 전체의 강화 효과를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제 후 적 전체를 공격합니다.(효과 저항 무시)
공격 후 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>과 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
대상이 보스인 경우 방어력을 30% 무시합니다.
이 스킬은 공격력 대신 최대 체력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
解除全体敌人<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个<color=#28d9ed>增益效果</color>后攻击全体敌人。(无视效果抵抗)
攻击后,使我方全体<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>与自身<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合。
若目标为首领,则无视其30%的防御力。
此技能造成的伤害与最大生命值成正比,而非攻击力。

true_desc_levels.1:
<color=#ffd732>Chain Finish Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. This skill's damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> instead of Attack.
\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, with a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance, <color=#28d9ed>Taunts</color> the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turns</color>. This skill's damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> instead of Attack.

This skill's damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> instead of Attack.
\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, with a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance, <color=#28d9ed>Taunts</color> the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turns</color>. This skill's damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> instead of Attack.

이 스킬은 공격력 대신 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
<color=#ffd732>连锁终结效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率,使我方全体的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
该技能的伤害与最大生命值成正比,而非攻击力。


<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率,使目标进入<color=#28d9ed>嘲讽</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
该技能的伤害与最大生命值成正比,而非攻击力。

SKT_FUSION_PASSIVE.name: Core-Fused Passive
SKT_FUSION_PASSIVE.name_jp: コアフュージョンパッシブ

true_desc_levels.1: At the start of battle, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: At the start of battle, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nIncreases Damage for all allies currently affected by increase Defencse
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 戦闘開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>が <color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 戦闘開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>が <color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。\n防御力UP効果を受けた味方全体が与えるダメージが増加する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 전투 시작 시, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 전투 시작 시, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명피해</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 증가합니다.\n방어력 증가 효과를 받는 아군 전체의 피해량이 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 战斗开始时,自身的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 战斗开始时,自身的<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n使受到<color=#28d9ed>防御力提升</color>效果的我方全体造成的伤害提高。

2: Increases the damage dealt by allies who are under a Defense Up effect.
2_jp: 防御力UP効果受ける味方のダメージ増加
2_kr: 방어력 증가 효과 받는 아군 피해량 증가
2_zh: 受到防御力提升效果的友军造成的伤害提高。
